title: Vanilla Re-Envisioned
description: A little thing I decided to do to give back to the Minecraft community. I love Minecraft but it 100% needs an upgrade, so that's what I did.
body:
![Vanilla Re-Envisioned Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0a1a37f1dca4ce1e686c9a585d6c63fc5d431f4.png)
## WARNING!!!: The Beta is HEAVILLY under construction. anything that is broken or not working as intended is planned to be or has already been fixed! if there are any problems that you have, send it to the vanilla re-envisioned suggestions channel in the discord.

Also DO NOT USE ANY RUBBLE SHIELD VARIANT FROM ENDERSCAPE IT WILL CRASH YOUR GAME!!!

### Inspired by Raspberry Flavored and Detour

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FURfTfpV4WI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## WELCOME TO VANILLA RE-ENVISIONED!
This pack aims to change most to all aspects of the game and make the game more interesting for everyone with funny secrets hidden throughout!

Things such as...


**Performance!**       
I tried my best to optimize the pack as best I could but, do let me know if you have any good optimization mod suggestions. while this pack is optimized, its highly recommended that you allocate at least 6gb of ram for this pack and that you have a semi powerful cpu as it is intensive cpu/gpu wise as well as take reqular breaks as prolonged play will cause your performance to dip after around an hour or two of play. sorry low end gamers :(
        (Do I need to list every single performance mod?!)


**Fishing!**    
New mechanics and reels to pull in. fine additions revolving around fishing have been updated as well as new ways to use your fishing rod and quite a strong way to get certain gear. Warm, Cold, and Temperate biomes now have specific loot tables for their temp.
        (**[REDACTED]**, Multiline Mastery, Enchancement, etc.)


**World Gen!**     
Existing structures have been heavily revamped in order for a more interesting experience as well as more biomes and structures added to increase your level of fun and intruge while you explore your new and vast world. some structures have been untouched or reverted due to being way too crazy or over the top. 
        (Trial Towers, CliffTree, Dungeons and Taverns, etc.)


**Mobs!**    
Mobs have been added from the vote along with improving or adding things to older mobs. even adding new variants around the world and making the surface overall safer. Currently no mobs spawn on the surface but you can disable that by disabling the mod, Peaceful Nights.
        (No Enderman Grief, Friends & Foes, Creeper Confetti Plus, etc.)


**Inventory**   
Your inventory problems are (mostly) solved! upgraded bundles are the main storage solution to carry all your junk around as well as sort your chests with a click of a button. Bundles also have fun features and tools that can help with the collection of items.
        (Client Sort, Metal Bundles, Braver Bundles, etc.)


**Combat!**   
Harness the power with new weapons and abilities to abliterate your enemies and protect your land with you beautiful 2nd amendment rights! Whether you are a melee or ranged fighter, there is something for you to play with.
        (Enchancement, Starbound, **[REDACTED]**, etc.)


**Music & Sound!**   
Embrace the land with tunes for just about anyone with it being more frequent and being able to control how loud everything is so you can either enjoy the game with everything to the max or chill, quiet vibes.
        (Sounds, Discs where discs shouldn't be, Miku additions, etc.)


**Progression!**    
Have iron gear that you deeply love and want to hold onto, well you can now upgrade any iron piece to diamond (so long as you have a diamond, your selected gear, a basic upgrade template, and a smithing table on hand) as well as getting to the end being a bit harder as you have to explore your world in order to access the end but not too far. well technically speaking its easier but ill leave that for you to discover)
        (**[REDACTED]**, Enchancement, Enderscape, etc.)


**The End?!**    
Ill leave that for you to explore :)


**Silly Secrets**    
Lets see if you can find them all :3
